summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OCTON VAR three new enhancements: video upload/streaming with Range requests, analysis speed optimization, and animated brain logo replacement. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend features working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Analysis takes 11-13 seconds per incident (35s for 3 concurrent)

ui_bugs.issue: SVG animate elements not detected in automated test
ui_bugs.note: Logo displays correctly, animation may be CSS-based rather than SVG animate

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts clicks on video controls when modal is open
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work, modal closes properly with Escape

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/files/{path} with Range request support (206 status)
Backend: All existing APIs functional (38/45 tests passed - 84.4%)
Frontend: Animated neocortex brain SVG logo on login page
Frontend: Animated brain logo in sidebar
Frontend: Video upload field in new incident modal
Frontend: Match replay scrubber with step controls (1/10 frames)
Frontend: Brain pathway visualization (Hippocampus + Neo Cortex)
Frontend: Video player container and controls
Video streaming: Range requests return 206 with proper headers
